Hi Denys,

We are excited to share that your Google AI plan subscription now unlocks  
access to paid pro models and higher usage limits in Google AI Studio:

- Pro models  
access<https://c.gle/ADMV5J8AaiAlM6yqNPTIQjFIF9l6bi8yir7r6783xIsQuXe9P5WdS6KIEGtVoefy9tkULlIvry19SNooxzCHrOlP5Aic26xcFuHpbQXZjpCe4Nqsmm0KmAzih6RC7LDf3IMoSM55ZgL0r1LXCq4nJUon2xsy77H8_GI>  
includes paid Nano Banana Pro 🍌, Lyria Pro and Gemini Pro.

- Higher usage  
limits<https://c.gle/ADMV5J92fSrMGzVRiozKKyGWVlgvTl3wK0B5YhALIuMs-4F_6OQQL5kKwjkSrt7wUHXbRfxm31pdNrgn4vQn_2be2jvAVM7MDiDK6gDwsiz3Obroe7CRHr0KFTDcDqz7R6oBZ_CeO_odnGvoSCBfTruR_SgfZ040yw>

Sign in to Google AI Studio with your linked Google AI subscription account  
today to get started!

Happy building,

The Google AI Studio team
